title: Room 1: Whiteboard Arena
description: A whiteboard lights up with a coding prompt. The panel asks about time complexity notation.
question: What is Big O notation used to describe?
answers: The growth of runtime or space as input grows
hint: It measures efficiency trends, not exact seconds.
success: The whiteboard clears and the next interview room unlocks.

title: Room 2: Debug Chamber
description: Error logs float around the room. One screen asks what you should do first when debugging.
question: What is usually the best first debugging step?
hint: You need a reliable way to observe the bug.
success: The logs fade away and the chamber door unlocks.

title: Room 3: System Design Gate
description: A giant diagram fills the wall. A voice asks what helps a service handle more traffic.
question: Which approach helps a service handle more users by adding more machines?
hint: Think scaling out, not just scaling up.
success: The system diagram reconfigures and the gate opens.
